subtitle.id: Tim profesional yang menggerakkan PT Bikin Orang Bahagia.
subtitle.en: The professional team powering PT Bikin Orang Bahagia.

desc.id: Bertanggung jawab atas pengambilan keputusan utama, arah bisnis perusahaan, pengembangan brand, kerja sama strategis, serta pengawasan operasional BOBA Group.
desc.en: Responsible for key decision-making, company business direction, brand development, strategic partnerships, and operational oversight of BOBA Group.

desc.id: Bertanggung jawab dalam pengelolaan administrasi perusahaan, strategi pemasaran, membangun identitas brand, koordinasi dokumen, serta mendukung kelancaran operasional harian BOBA Group.
desc.en: Responsible for managing company administration, marketing strategy, building brand identity, document coordination, and supporting the smooth daily operations of BOBA Group.

desc.id: Kopi, sawit, kakao, karet, dan komoditas agro unggulan
desc.en: Coffee, palm oil, cocoa, rubber, and premium agro commodities

desc.id: Distribusi bahan baku alam ke pasar global
desc.en: Natural raw material distribution to global markets

desc.id: Jaringan distribusi bahan baku alam di seluruh Indonesia
desc.en: Natural raw material distribution network across Indonesia

subholdingsSubtitle.id: Tiga entitas bisnis strategis yang beroperasi di bawah naungan BOBA Group dalam perdagangan bahan baku alam nasional dan ekspor.
subholdingsSubtitle.en: Three strategic business entities operating under BOBA Group in national and export natural raw material trading.

focus.id: Perdagangan komoditas pertanian dan perkebunan unggulan Indonesia — kelapa, ubi jalar, singkong, rempah-rempah, manggis, alpukat tropis, dan madu hutan — untuk pasar nasional dan ekspor.
focus.en: Trading of premium Indonesian agricultural and plantation commodities — coconut, sweet potato, cassava, spices, mangosteen, tropical avocado, and forest honey — for domestic and export markets.

products.id: Kelapa muda & kelapa tua untuk santan, minyak, dan ekspor
products.en: Young & mature coconut for coconut milk, oil, and export

products.id: Rempah segar: kunyit, jahe, kencur (nasional & ekspor)
products.en: Fresh spices: turmeric, ginger, kencur (domestic & export)

products.id: Buah tropis premium: manggis dan alpukat
products.en: Premium tropical fruits: mangosteen and avocado

products.id: Ubi jalar, singkong, dan madu hutan murni
products.en: Sweet potato, cassava, and pure forest honey

focus.id: Perdagangan kerajinan tangan artisanal dan tekstil tradisional Indonesia berbasis bahan alam — kayu, bambu, dan batik — bernilai ekspor tinggi.
focus.en: Trading of artisanal handicrafts and traditional Indonesian textiles from natural materials — wood, bamboo, and batik — with high export value.

products.id: Kerajinan kayu artisanal: jati, mahoni, sonokeling
products.en: Artisanal wood crafts: teak, mahogany, rosewood

products.id: Kerajinan bambu berkelanjutan: keranjang, lampu, aksesori
products.en: Sustainable bamboo crafts: baskets, lamps, accessories

products.id: Batik autentik: Batik Tulis & Cap untuk fashion dan interior ekspor
products.en: Authentic batik: Hand-drawn & Stamped Batik for fashion and export interiors

focus.id: Tanggung Jawab Sosial Perusahaan (CSR), filantropi, dan program pemberdayaan masyarakat berbasis komunitas petani dan pengrajin lokal.
focus.en: Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR), philanthropy, and community empowerment programs based on local farmers and artisans.

products.id: Donasi bencana alam: logistik, pakaian, dan kebutuhan darurat
products.en: Natural disaster relief: logistics, clothing, and emergency supplies
Donations to orphanages & elderly care homes

products.id: Dapur umum & distribusi gizi untuk komunitas rentan
products.en: Community kitchen & nutrition distribution for vulnerable communities

products.id: Pemberdayaan UMKM petani dan pengrajin lokal
products.en: Empowerment of local farmer and artisan SMEs

desc.id: PT BOBA membuka peluang kerja sama strategis bagi investor nasional dan internasional. Dengan ekosistem fashion + green technology yang terintegrasi, PT BOBA memiliki potensi pertumbuhan tinggi di pasar lokal maupun ekspor.
desc.en: PT BOBA opens strategic partnership opportunities for national and international investors. With an integrated fashion + green technology ecosystem, PT BOBA has high growth potential in both local and export markets.

points.id: Komitmen ESG & ekonomi sirkular via Green Services PT BOBA.
points.en: ESG commitment & circular economy via PT BOBA Green Services.
Experienced founding team across multiple sectors.

desc.id: Akses Investor Relations untuk profil lengkap, pitch deck, dan jadwal pertemuan.
desc.en: Access Investor Relations for a complete profile, pitch deck, and meeting schedule.
